channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The Suns' Big 3 is still together after the trade deadline, so the search for success continues
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant, Devin Booker and Bradley Beal are still members of the Phoenix Suns after a tumultuous trade deadline. Now they have roughly 30 games to turn around their disappointing season. The problem is there aren't many reasons to believe that's going to happen.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At 72 years old and out of the NFL, Bill Belichick makes presence known at the Super Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — At 72 years old and out of the NFL, Bill Belichick still stole the show during Super Bowl week. What's the former Patriots coach wearing on the red carpet? Try all of his Super Bowl rings.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RJ Luis and Kadary Richmond rally No. 12 St. John's to 68-62 victory over No. 19 UConn
item.description: RJ Luis Jr. scored six of his 21 points in the final 2:16 to help No. 12 St. John’s extend its winning streak to 10 games with a 68-62 victory over No. 19 UConn.
item.dc:creator: Jim Fuller, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Thomas Detry nearly aces 16, shoots 64 to take 2-shot lead in Phoenix Open
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Thomas Detry nearly aced the par-3 16th hole and shot a 7-under 64 in the second round to take a two-shot lead lead in the Phoenix Open on Friday. Detry had eight birdies and a bogey to reach 12 under on another day of perfect conditions at TPC Scottsdale.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NASCAR honors 'The Ironman' Ricky Rudd and 'Cousin Carl' Edwards as Hall of Fame inductees
item.description: One of the toughest drivers in NASCAR history joined one the most enigmatic drivers of the modern era as the newest inductees into the Hall of Fame in a star-studded Friday night ceremony.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bakersfield sports bars prepare for America's biggest football game
item.description: It's almost time for America's biggest game and local sports bars are preparing to serve you and yours on their biggest day of the year. Here's a look at Super Bowl 59 coming this Sunday to a big screen near you.
item.dc:creator: Rob Hagan, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Silicon Valley and Indian investors spend big as English cricket goes up for sale
item.description: Foreign investors have been googly-eyed about English soccer for decades. Now, they are buying into an even more quintessential English sport — cricket. Auctions of franchises in a tournament called The Hundred have attracted investors from India, Silicon Valley and New York over the past few days.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE and STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SDCC coach battles cancer while coaching
item.description: Jose Martinez's whole life is basketball, from playing on the Puerto Rican national team at 15 years old, to becoming an assistant coach at San Diego City College.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: BREAKING: Junior Hockey League expansion team coming to Grand Junction 2025
item.description: Starting this fall, the action and excitement of the National Collegiate Development Conference, the highest level of the United States Premiere Hockey League, a Tier II junior hockey league, will be in Grand Junction at River City Sportplex.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Dylan Guenther scores game-winner in OT again
item.description: COLUMBUS (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther has proven to have a penchant for the dramatic. For the second straight game, Utah's leading scorer found the back of the net in the final minute of overtime to give UHC a 3-2 win over Columbus Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Virginia Halas McCaskey, longtime Bears owner and matriarch, dies at 102
item.description: McCaskey had been the owner of the Bears since her father and team founder George S. Halas died on Oct. 31, 1983.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: MLB owners vote to install John Seidler as control person of San Diego Padres
item.description: Baseball owners voted Thursday to install John Seidler, the oldest brother of the late former Padres chairman Peter Seidler, as the team’s control person.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bulls, Ball agree to contract extension
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bulls and point guard Lonzo Ball have agreed to a two-year contract extension, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Charania reports the deal is worth $20 million over two years.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs hire former USF head coach Charlie Strong as defensive line coach
item.description: According to NFL Network's Ian Rapoport, the Bucs have hired former USF head coach Charlie Strong to be their new defensive line coach.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: USU hits 20-win mark with 71-67 victory at Wyoming
item.description: LARAMIE, Wyo. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its most disappointing performance of the season, a 19-point loss at home to New Mexico, the Utah State basketball rebounded nicely with a hard-fought 71-67 victory at Wyoming Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matt Nagy offers advice for Ben Johnson, prepares for 2nd matchup against Vic Fangio in the Big Game
item.description: Matt Nagy, Kansas City Chiefs offensive coordinator, shared advice for the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, emphasizing the importance of winning and beating the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 70 Illinois residents can win Las Vegas vacation with Rosati's Pizza
item.description: Illinois residents can enter the Rosati's Pizza sweepstakes and win a three-day, two-night vacation at the Circa Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, with the contest closing on the day of the Big Game.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: President Donald Trump to attend Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Many A-list stars are often seen at large sporting events, dawning their favorite team's gear and posting the experiences on social media. But hardly any can compare to the magnitude of the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz lose heartbreaker to Indiana, 112-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz could not hold a 12-point lead in the final six minutes, and lose to the Indiana Pacers Monday night at the Delta Center, 112-111.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rumors swirl about Warriors re-acquiring Kevin Durant amid chaotic NBA trade deadline
item.description: (KRON) -- The 2025 NBA trade deadline has provided even no shortage of excitement so far, and the Golden State Warriors could be the next team to get involved.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Doncic releases emotional farewell message to Dallas after trade sends him to Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic released an emotional farewell to Dallas on Sunday, the same day a trade sending him from the Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers in a swap for fellow All-NBA player Anthony Davis was finalized.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: The trade was put together in secret, with only a precious few people knowing what was happening. Luka Doncic didn't know. Anthony Davis didn't know. Their coaches didn't know. Their teammates didn't know. And then it happened — an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Canadian fans boo U.S. National Anthem at hockey game amid trade war
item.description: Canadians aren’t too happy with the tariffs being imposed on their country by U.S. President Donald Trump. Trump signed an order Saturday to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Canada as well as Mexico and China, which drew swift retaliation and sparked a trade war.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Ohtani's return to pitching could come in May for World Series champion Dodgers
item.description:
Shohei Ohtani pitching for the Los Angeles Dodgers in May is "about right,” manager Dave Roberts said Saturday at the team's annual fan fest.
He reiterated that Ohtani won't pitch in the season-opening Japan Series against the Chicago Cubs on March 18-19 in Tokyo.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5
